sys_script_include.description: The DevToolsGetFormatConfig function is called by the DevTools extension point instance class and returns an object with field formatting information.
sys_script_include.name: DevToolsGetFormatConfig

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_ac6718d3db4a8510bcced03cd39619f9
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include">
    <sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
        <access>public</access>
        <active>true</active>
        <api_name>x_snc_codesanity.DevToolsGetFormatConfig</api_name>
        <caller_access>1</caller_access>
        <client_callable>false</client_callable>
        <description>The DevToolsGetFormatConfig function is called by the DevTools extension point instance class and returns an object with field formatting information.</description>
        <mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable>
        <name>DevToolsGetFormatConfig</name>
        <sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable>
        <script><![CDATA[function DevToolsGetFormatConfig(grRecord)
{
	var strTable = grRecord.getRecordClassName();

	/*
	if (strTable == 'x_your_table')
	{
		var formatconfig = {
			performance: {
				decimals: 2,
				postfix: ' %'
			}
		};
		return formatconfig;
	}
	*/

	return false;
}]]></script>
        <sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name>
        <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
        <sys_created_on>2022-03-10 09:51:04</sys_created_on>
        <sys_id>ac6718d3db4a8510bcced03cd39619f9</sys_id>
        <sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count>
        <sys_name>DevToolsGetFormatConfig</sys_name>
        <sys_package display_value="CodeSanity WORK IN PROGRESS" source="x_snc_codesanity">8ed42c23dbad0510bcced03cd39619ce</sys_package>
        <sys_policy/>
        <sys_scope display_value="CodeSanity WORK IN PROGRESS">8ed42c23dbad0510bcced03cd39619ce</sys_scope>

        <x_snc_devtools_sys_ui_script/>
    </sys_script_include>
</record_update>
